title: Specification-led brownfield change preset
targetUser: Maintainers modernizing an existing product where Spec Kit-style feature artifacts or structured specification documents already exist.

recommendedWhen: A brownfield change needs traceability from existing requirements and task lists to Context Pack and ExecPlan evidence.
The team already has Spec Kit or Spec Kit-like feature directories.
Reviewers need to see lossy mappings, missing contracts, and task coverage before implementation.
notRecommendedWhen: There is no structured specification, task list, or reviewable requirement source.
The change is too small to justify specification import and task mapping.
The team expects Spec Kit commands to be executed automatically; this preset only imports local artifacts.

requiredInputs.name: Spec Kit feature directory
requiredInputs.description: Contains specification, plan, tasks, and optional contracts for the brownfield feature.

requiredInputs.name: Spec Kit constitution or governance memory
requiredInputs.description: Provides governance context for unsupported or lossy bridge mappings.

requiredInputs.name: Imported Context Pack
requiredInputs.description: Bridge output that becomes the ae-framework design SSOT candidate.

requiredInputs.name: Imported ExecPlan v2
requiredInputs.description: Bridge output that connects imported tasks to verification and evidence requirements.

startingCommand.purpose: Import local Spec Kit-style artifacts into ae-framework Context Pack and ExecPlan v2 outputs.

defaultVerificationCommands.purpose: Build deterministic bridge artifacts for review.
Validate the imported Context Pack candidate before adopting it as SSOT.
Validate imported tasks, evidence requirements, and commands.

expectedArtifacts.reviewPurpose: Shows imported fields, unsupported mappings, warnings, and bridge result.
Candidate design SSOT generated from local Spec Kit artifacts.
Task and evidence plan generated from the imported feature.

evidenceSurfaces.description: Human-readable bridge findings, unsupported fields, and mapping summary.
Record whether imported Context Pack/ExecPlan was adopted, edited, or rejected.

escalationRule.trigger: Escalate when bridge result is `fail`, warnings hide a required contract, or imported boundaries conflict with the current Context Pack.
escalationRule.action: Stop automation, resolve the source specification or boundary conflict, and require a human decision before adopting imported artifacts.

optionalCommands.purpose: Check whether imported boundaries create dependency or ownership conflicts.

specVerificationKit.guidance: Use `pnpm run spec-kit-min:verify` after imported requirements have traceable examples or property checks.

specKitBridge.guidance: This preset is specifically for local Spec Kit-style feature import; it does not execute Spec Kit commands.
